name: Bar Leather Apron
tagline: One of the world's best cocktail bars hidden on a downtown Honolulu mezzanine — 15 seats, Japanese technique, local ingredients.
talkStory: Founded by Justin Park, who left a finance career to pursue bartending, this 15-seat speakeasy landed on Asia's 50 Best Bars and won a Spirited Award at Tales of the Cocktail. Justin trained in Tokyo and brings Japanese precision to every drink, using house-made syrups from local citrus and Hawaiian honey. Reservations are essential and released weekly online -- walk-ins only work on quiet Tuesday or Wednesday nights.
